activity_name: Register the SSN of the patient

llm_result.activity_name: Register the SSN of the patient

ground_truth_steps.description: Ask the patient for their Social Security Number (SSN)

response_steps.description: Ask the patient for their Social Security Number (SSN) and request their official ID for verification.

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps involve asking the patient for their SSN. The response step adds requesting official ID, which is an additional detail but does not change the core action.

ground_truth_steps.description: Verify the SSN format for accuracy

response_steps.description: Verify the entered SSN matches the official ID and confirm no errors.

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps involve verification of the SSN. The ground truth focuses on format accuracy, while the response focuses on matching with official ID and error confirmation. The core verification intent is functionally equivalent.

ground_truth_steps.description: Input the SSN into the registration system

response_steps.description: Enter the SSN into the designated field in the HIS.
Save the SSN entry in the patient record.

step_mappings.explanation: The ground truth step combines entering and saving the SSN into one action. The response splits this into two separate steps: entering into the HIS field and saving the record. The scope differs in granularity.
